subject: Re: WarpTools ts_export_particles failes with half of the tilt series
body:
Could you please paste the contents of a log file for one of the tilt series that failed
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On Oct 18, 2024, at 07:02, Juha Huiskonen <juha.huiskonen@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿I checked the logs, and it seems these tilt series are just skipped; there is no error, no reason printed. 
On Friday 18 October 2024 at 16:57:53 UTC+3 alist...@gmail.com wrote:
Hi Juha,



Did you “Check logs in /scratch/project_2007321/users/huiskone/warptools/g2/relion_new2/logs for more info” as the message suggests?



Cheers,



Alister
